Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hello, this is Sugiseki from BBV.[n]{f 1 5 0}Have you heard of charmstones? They're just one type of healing item. The power that comes from stones can have many different effects.[n]{f 1 5 0}It's impossible to cover everything in a single message! Please come visit our store![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is Sugiseki from BBV.[n]{f 1 5 0}We're short on staff and looking for someone to work part-time![n]{f 1 5 0}We'll teach you about our crystals, and we guarantee the atmosphere of the store will make you feel great![n]{f 1 5 0}This is a paid position, no experience necessary![n]{f 1 5 0}We look forward to seeing you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is Sugiseki from BBV.[n]{f 1 5 0}We're very busy today, so if you have time, please consider helping us out![n]{f 1 5 0}We'll teach you about our crystals, and we guarantee the atmosphere of the store will make you feel great![n]{f 1 5 0}This is a paid position, no experience necessary![n]{f 1 5 0}We look forward to seeing you![n]{f 1 1}
